reviews.comment:
El lugar es lindo es amplio, hay lugar para comer en mesas afuera bien de campo las instalaciones las mantienen bastante bien por el volumen de gente que manejan. Los baños no dan a basto ya que se llenan pero sin embargo los mantienen bastante limpios a comparación de otros lugares en la ruta es un lujo.

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice and spacious. There's plenty of room to eat at outdoor tables, and the facilities are well-maintained for the volume of people they handle. The bathrooms are overcrowded, but they're kept pretty clean compared to other places along the route, which is a luxury.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBM2M3UVZREAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene todo lo necesario... Y sombra para descansar y comer en mesitas. Muy lindo para parar a mitad de camino de Bs. As. Y la costa

(Translated by Google)
It has everything you need... and shade to rest and eat at the little tables. A very nice place to stop halfway between Buenos Aires and the coast.

reviews.comment:
Tendrian que solucionar el tema de los termos de agua. No tienen cambio en monedas y no funcionan de otra forma.

(Translated by Google)
They need to fix the issue with the water heaters. They don't accept change in coins and they don't work any other way.
